name: io.github.engramia/engramia
title: Engramia
description: Persistent memory for AI agents — eval-weighted recall, multi-evaluator consensus, GDPR Art. 17/20 governance, multi-tenant RBAC, and audit logging built in.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key. Required when ENGRAMIA_LLM_PROVIDER is openai (the default) — used for chat completions and text-embedding-3-small.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAMIA_STORAGE
environmentVariables.description: Storage backend: 'json' (file-based, dev default) or 'postgres' (production with pgvector).

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAMIA_DATA_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path for JSON storage when ENGRAMIA_STORAGE=json. Defaults to ./engramia_data.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAMIA_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection URL when ENGRAMIA_STORAGE=postgres. Required for production usage.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAMIA_LLM_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: LLM provider for evaluation and prompt evolution: 'openai' (default) or 'anthropic'.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAMIA_LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: LLM model identifier. Defaults to 'gpt-4.1' for openai or 'claude-sonnet-4-6' for anthropic.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key. Required when ENGRAMIA_LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAMIA_LOCAL_EMBEDDINGS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to use sentence-transformers locally instead of OpenAI embeddings. Removes the OPENAI_API_KEY requirement.
